Privacy Policy

Last updated: 13 April 2026

LX Sixty Group ("we", "our", "us") is committed to protecting and respecting your privacy. This policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your personal data when you visit our website or interact with us.

1. Data Controller

LX Sixty Group is the data controller responsible for your personal data. If you have questions about this policy, contact us at info@lxsixty.com.

2. Information We Collect

We may collect the following personal data:

  • Technical data: IP address, browser type, operating system, and browsing behaviour collected automatically when you visit our website.

3. How We Use Your Data

We use your personal data for the following purposes:

  • To administer and improve our website.
  • To comply with legal obligations.

4. Lawful Basis for Processing

We process your personal data on the following legal bases under UK GDPR:

  • Legitimate interests: To operate and improve our website, where this does not override your rights.

5. Data Sharing

We do not sell your personal data. We may share data with:

  • Service providers: Website hosting (Cloudflare), font delivery (Google Fonts), who process data on our behalf under appropriate safeguards.
  • Legal requirements: If required by law, regulation, or legal process.

6. International Transfers

Some of our service providers (including Cloudflare and Google) may transfer data outside the UK. Where this occurs, appropriate safeguards are in place, including Standard Contractual Clauses and adequacy decisions.

7. Data Retention

We retain personal data only for as long as necessary to fulfil the purposes for which it was collected, or as required by law.

8. Your Rights

Under UK GDPR, you have the right to:

  • Access your personal data
  • Rectify inaccurate data
  • Request erasure of your data
  • Restrict or object to processing
  • Data portability
  • Withdraw consent at any time

To exercise any of these rights, email info@lxsixty.com.

9. Complaints

If you are unhappy with how we handle your data, you have the right to lodge a complaint with the Information Commissioner's Office (ICO) at ico.org.uk.

10. Cookie Policy

Cookies are small text files placed on your device when you visit a website. We use the following types of cookies:

Essential Cookies

These are necessary for the website to function and cannot be switched off. They include:

  • Cookie consent preference (lx60_cookie_consent): Remembers your cookie choice. Stored in localStorage. No expiry until cleared.

Third-Party Cookies

Our website loads fonts from Google Fonts, which may set cookies and collect data (including IP addresses) subject to Google's Privacy Policy. If you select "Essential Only" or "Reject All" on our cookie banner, these fonts will still load as they are integral to the website's presentation, but no additional tracking or analytics cookies are used.

Analytics

We do not currently use any analytics or tracking cookies.

Managing Cookies

You can control cookies through your browser settings. Disabling cookies may affect the functionality of this website. You can also change your preference by clearing your browser's localStorage for this site.

11. Changes to This Policy

We may update this policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page with an updated date.

Privacy Policy Cookie Policy

© 2026 LX Sixty Group. All rights reserved.
